title: Cell-type-specific inhibitory circuitry from a connectomic census of mouse visual cortex
abstract: A comprehensive census of inhibitory neuron connectivity in mouse visual cortex using the MICrONS millimeter-scale EM volume. Identifies cell-type-specific wiring rules for inhibitory interneurons across all cortical layers, revealing specialized connectivity motifs including disinhibitory circuits targeting basket cells.
notes: Already in existing 102 as bodor-2025 and cross-listed under Reid. Schneider-Mizell first author perspective.
